name: Trapped Chamber Ambush
description: You triggered a trap! Shadow wraiths materialize to finish off weakened intruders!

dungeon_l2_encounter_3_complete.display_message: The ambush fails. The wraiths dissipate with agonized wails. Level 2 is clear!

dungeon_level_2_complete.display_message: Level 2 cleared! The stairs to Level 3 are now accessible.

special_rules.description: Party already took trap damage before combat started
Wraiths have resistance to physical damage

ambient_description: The trap springs! Blades slash from the walls as shadowy forms materialize around you. The wraiths laugh with hollow voices as they move to attack.
victory_description: The wraiths dissolve into darkness. The trap mechanism falls silent. You've survived the ambush and cleared Level 2.
defeat_description: You retreat, badly wounded from both trap and wraiths. The trap resets with an ominous click.
